title: astragalus minimus
intro: Astragalus minimus, also known as lesser milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress, and it contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The medicinal properties of Astragalus minimus have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and preventing respiratory infections. Astragalus minimus is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
